tools.name: tavily_extract
tools.description: 使用 Tavily Extract 从一个或多个指定 URL 提取网页内容。Extract raw content from web pages with basic or advanced extraction modes.

urls.description: One or more URLs to extract content from (comma-separated if multiple).

query.description: Optional query string to rerank extracted content chunks based on relevance to user intent.

include_images.description: Include images from the URLs in the response. Default is false.

include_favicon.description: When set to true, includes the favicon URL for each result.

extract_depth.description: Extraction depth - 'basic' (default, faster) or 'advanced' (more data, higher cost).

format.description: Format of extracted content - 'markdown' (default) or 'text' (plain text).

chunks_per_source.description: Maximum number of relevant content chunks (1-5) returned per source. Default is 3.

timeout.description: Request timeout in seconds (1.0-60.0). Default is 10s for basic, 30s for advanced.

include_usage.description: When set to true, includes API credit usage information in the response.

project_id.description: Optional project ID for usage tracking and analytics. Will be sent as X-Project-ID header.

tools.name: tavily_map
tools.description: 使用 Tavily Map 从根 URL 开始发现所有 URL，映射网站结构。Map a website's structure by discovering all URLs starting from a root URL.

url.description: The root URL to begin the website mapping from.

instructions.description: Natural language guidance for crawling behavior. Note that using instructions doubles API credit consumption.

max_depth.description: Exploration distance from base URL. Range is 1-5. Default is 1.

max_breadth.description: Number of links followed per page level. Range is 1-500. Default is 20.

limit.description: Total links processed before halting. Minimum is 1. Default is 50.

select_paths.description: Comma-separated regex patterns to filter URLs by path. Only URLs matching these patterns will be included.

select_domains.description: Comma-separated regex patterns to filter URLs by domain. Only URLs from matching domains will be included.

exclude_paths.description: Comma-separated regex patterns to exclude URLs by path. URLs matching these patterns will be omitted.

exclude_domains.description: Comma-separated regex patterns to exclude URLs by domain. URLs from matching domains will be blocked.

allow_external.description: When set to true, includes external domain links in results. Default is true.

timeout.description: Maximum wait duration in seconds. Range is 10-150. Default is 150.

include_usage.description: When set to true, includes API credit usage information in the response.

project_id.description: Optional project ID for usage tracking and analytics. Will be sent as X-Project-ID header.

tools.name: tavily_research
tools.description: 使用 Tavily Research API 对任何主题进行深度研究，返回带引用的综合报告。Conduct deep, comprehensive research on any topic, returning detailed reports with citations and sources.

input.description: The research task or question to investigate. Be specific and detailed for better results.

citation_format.description: Citation format for sources: numbered, MLA, APA, or Chicago style.

project_id.description: Optional project ID for tracking and analytics. Sent as X-Project-ID header.

tools.name: tavily_search
tools.description: 专为 AI 代理构建的搜索引擎，提供实时、准确的结果。A search engine built for AI agents (LLMs), delivering real-time, accurate, and factual results.

query.description: The search query you want to execute with Tavily.

country.description: Boost results from a specific country (e.g. 'china', 'us'). Only when topic is general.

auto_parameters.description: Automatically configure search parameters based on query. Default false.

include_images.description: Include query-related images in the response. Default false.

include_image_descriptions.description: When include_images is true, add descriptions for each image. Default false.

include_favicon.description: Include favicon URL for each result. Default false.

include_answer.description: Include a short answer: false, true/basic, or advanced for detailed answer.

include_raw_content.description: Include raw content per result: false, true/markdown, or text.

include_domains.description: Comma- or space-separated list of domains to include in search.

exclude_domains.description: Comma- or space-separated list of domains to exclude from search.

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return (1-20). Default 5.

chunks_per_source.description: Max content chunks per source (1-3). Only when search_depth is advanced. Default 3.

include_usage.description: Include API usage (token counts, credits) in the response. Default false.

project_id.description: Optional project ID for tracking. Sent as X-Project-ID header.
